SFW STARTER! YAY!

I've been sitting on this bot for a bit while I tried to find the motivation to do, but come on! A cryptid with a fat ass? I gotta do this!

Plus, I can actually do more with this concept. I love the whole 'scaroused' thing, so I'll definitely do more of these... once I find more images like this. I WAS going to add more Princess Peach quotes, but couldn't find anywhere to naturally fit them in, so.... shrug!

I don't really have much to say since I'm using all of my brainpower to describe Peach, so...

Yes, you can get freaky with the grotesque lady.

Yes, you can (probably) befriend the grotesque lady.

Happy gooning/befriending!
